name: token_check
description: Before swapping into an unknown ERC-20 token on Base, call this to verify it is safe. Returns: trustScore 0-100, verdict (trusted/proceed/caution/avoid), riskFlags (honeypot/highTax/unverified), riskSummary. Use when: you have a token address and want to know if it is safe to buy. For hiring agents instead of checking tokens, use agent_trust. For a bundled check+swap in one call, use trust_swap.

token.description: 0x contract address of the ERC-20 token to check (Base mainnet)
